title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running large language models locally; supports Llama-2, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma and more.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface); manage models, chat history, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; async & sync generators, embeddings, model management.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming, dependency injection helpers, and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic access to the Ollama REST API; includes CLI wrapper.

title: OllamaKit
summary: Swift package for iOS/macOS apps to chat with Ollama models via Swift Concurrency.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Enhanced Node CLI for Ollama with conversation persistence, prompt templates, and shell piping.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for VS Code; local, private, free.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC model cache, and ingress.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, Redis session store and Nginx.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit cookbook showing how to build a chatbot UI backed by Ollama models in minutes.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama; build local RAG with LlamaParse support.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated registry of custom Ollama Modelfiles; submit & download fine-tuned GGUFs.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama users; share models, troubleshooting, benchmarks and feature requests.

title: ollama-hacker-news-discussion
summary: Hacker News thread discussing Ollama v0.1.38 release with multi-modal vision support.

title: Ollama on Awesome-Selfhosted
summary: Awesome-Selfhosted list entry for Ollama, highlighting it as a local LLM solution for self-hosters.
